_publications._publicationTitle: Single-cell RNA sequencing of neurofibromas reveals a tumor microenvironment favorable for neural regeneration and immune suppression in a neurofibromatosis type 1 porcine model.

_contextSnippet: Using both automatic and manual cell typing, we identified Schwann cells, fibroblasts, myeloid cells, vascular smooth muscle cells/pericytes, endothelial cells, T cells, and neutrophils
details: Used for automatic cell type identification based on scores, successfully identifying Schwann cells, fibroblasts, myeloid cells, vascular smooth muscle cells/pericytes, endothelial cells, T cells, and neutrophils
